final_prompt.prompt:
Create a vertical short-video cover for an 8k GGU gaming monitor launch, designed for Douyin/Xiaohongshu feed impact, in the restrained confidence of minimalist premium tech branding.

Style/medium: vertical short-video cover with the clean precision of minimalist tech branding, designed for thumb-stopping feed presence
Composition: rule-of-thirds grid, primary headline occupying the upper-third zone with generous breathing room, product visual anchoring the lower two-thirds
Subject: "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as dominant headline typography, secondary supporting text "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" positioned below
Scene/backdrop: pure neutral void or subtle gradient field, the absence of clutter allowing the headline to command full attention
Lighting/mood: the crisp confidence of premium tech unveiling, a quiet stage for the product to speak
Color palette: neutral graphite and cool silver with a single accent of electric blue or amber for the headline, the tension between restraint and energy
Materials/textures: smooth matte surface, the visual equivalent of brushed aluminum and glass
Text (verbatim): 8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz, 全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩
Constraints: vertical 9:16 ratio optimized for short-video platforms, headline must dominate upper third, minimal visual elements only
Avoid: busy backgrounds, multiple competing focal points, decorative flourishes, warm cozy tones, information overload
